raw_output: {"http_records": [{"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/users?q=test&page=1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:3000", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "List users with search"}, {"method": "POST", "url": "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/users", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:3000", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, "body": "{\"name\": \"test\", \"email\": \"test@example.com\"}", "notes": "Create user"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/users/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:3000", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "Get user by ID"}, {"method": "PUT", "url": "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/users/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:3000", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, "body": "{\"name\": \"updated\"}", "notes": "Update user"}, {"method": "DELETE", "url": "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/users/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:3000"}, "notes": "Delete user"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/health", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:3000"}, "notes": "Health check"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:3000/status", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:3000"}, "notes": "Status endpoint"}, {"method": "POST", "url": "http://localhost:3000/login", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:3000", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, "body": "{\"username\": \"admin\", \"password\": \"password123\"}", "notes": "Login endpoint"}]}
